intro: Spidey was thrilled to get an invite to the neighborhood cookout, but unfortunately things took a real TURN ON THE GRILL for our little guy.
caption: I slid him onto a kebab skewer between a cherry tomato and a bell pepper and cooked him over the coals until he was done.
hidden_touch: A tiny paper plate with a smiley face drawn on it sits beside the grill; a small hand-lettered sign reads 'SPIDEY'S FIRST BBQ'
scene_description: A backyard scene with a flat green lawn and bright blue sky. A simple gray charcoal grill sits center frame with orange-red spray-paint flames licking up from beneath the grate. On the grill, a kebab skewer holds a gray oval spider body sandwiched between a red tomato and a yellow pepper chunk. Spidey's stick legs dangle limply and his mouth is a small surprised O. A red checkered tablecloth is draped over a boxy table to the right with a paper plate and a plastic cup. The sun peeks from the top corner with a smiley face.
